title: Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) calculation sheet for the 2023 base year for residents of Ontario (quarterly amounts) - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) calculation sheet for the 2023 base year for residents of Ontario (quarterly amounts)

## Jurisdictional basic benefit

## Rural supplement (see note below)
Note : The CCR includes a supplement for residents of small and rural communities. Pending receiving Royal Assent, the rural supplement will double from 10% to 20% as of April 2024. Find out if you qualify for the supplement for residents of small and rural communities .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
